title: Hexxed
description: This mod is a successor mod to "Forsaken Crowns" they do not have to be played together, but they are meant to compliment each other with what they bring into minecraft.
body:
Hexxed is a mod themed off of Imbuing your Items with magic, adding Spellbound and Hexxed variants of the diamond sword and axe, as well as some new items, this mod is meant to expand on the combat options in Minecraft.
Upon obtaining your first new material, a Sparkling Gem, you will get an advancement and an Old Page, It might be helpful to use it...
New Items include:
Shurikens,
Papernades,
Pistols,
Risky Revolver,
Hexxed Tome,
Hexxed Lantern,
Sparkling Gem,
Hexxed Smithing Template,
Plagued Gem,
Bloodied Gem,
Enlightened Gem,
Tormented Gem,
Ancient Scroll,
Needle-point Rapier,
Vorpan (Dead Cells Reference),
Pure Nail (Hollow Knight Reference),
Galaxia (Kirby Reference (Meta Knight's Sword)).

i Strongly Advise using JEI as usual, as some of the crafting recipies are wack.
(To Obtain the Spellbound Variants of the Diamond Sword/Axe,hold said item in your main hand, and right click a Ritualistic Glyph with a Sparkling Gem in your off hand)
